rows.question: What is document/file 'Question Paper' used for?
rows.build_instruction: Represent document question_paper in files/documents spec with mode=uploaded, formats=pdf.
rows.test_instruction: Verify question_paper appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'Question Paper'?
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only operations_staff can create question_paper.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'Question Paper'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for question_paper: pdf.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for question_paper.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'Question Paper'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for question_paper: restricted; Private, gated by payment/slot/release window; downloads audited.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies question_paper cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'Question Paper'?
rows.answer: Private, gated by payment/slot/release window; downloads audited.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for question_paper: Private, gated by payment/slot/release window; downloads audited.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for question_paper.

rows.question: What is document/file 'OMR Answer Sheet' used for?
rows.answer: Candidate/school-specific or generic OMR answer sheet.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document omr_sheet in files/documents spec with mode=generated_or_uploaded, formats=pdf.
rows.test_instruction: Verify omr_sheet appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'OMR Answer Sheet'?
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only operations_staff can create omr_sheet.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'OMR Answer Sheet'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for omr_sheet: pdf.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for omr_sheet.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'OMR Answer Sheet'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for omr_sheet: restricted; Private; released only after gates; downloads audited.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies omr_sheet cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'OMR Answer Sheet'?
rows.answer: Private; released only after gates; downloads audited.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for omr_sheet: Private; released only after gates; downloads audited.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for omr_sheet.

rows.question: What is document/file 'Attendance Sheet' used for?
rows.answer: Candidate attendance list for invigilator/school use.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document attendance_sheet in files/documents spec with mode=generated, formats=pdf,csv.
rows.test_instruction: Verify attendance_sheet appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'Attendance Sheet'?
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only system,operations_staff can create attendance_sheet.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'Attendance Sheet'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for attendance_sheet: pdf,csv.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for attendance_sheet.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'Attendance Sheet'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for attendance_sheet: private; Private own-school only; downloaded with exam pack.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies attendance_sheet cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'Attendance Sheet'?
rows.answer: Private own-school only; downloaded with exam pack.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for attendance_sheet: Private own-school only; downloaded with exam pack.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for attendance_sheet.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'Courier Label'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for courier_label: private; Private; included in material/courier workflow.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies courier_label cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'Courier Label'?
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for courier_label: Private; included in material/courier workflow.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for courier_label.
